creator: david@catwhisker.org
text:
As of ports r346243, I had no trouble re-integrating the (re)build of
x11/nvidia-driver into my kernel builds for the following environments:

FreeBSD 9.2-STABLE #678  r262545M/262552:902506: Thu Feb 27 04:52:56 PST 2014     root@g1-252.catwhisker.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/CANARY  i386

FreeBSD 10.0-STABLE #1162  r262544M/262552:1000702: Thu Feb 27 05:28:27 PST 2014     root@g1-252.catwhisker.org:/common/S3/obj/usr/src/sys/CANARY  i386

FreeBSD 11.0-CURRENT #1174  r262552M/262552:1100009: Thu Feb 27 06:08:18 PST 2014     root@g1-252.catwhisker.org:/common/S4/obj/usr/src/sys/CANARY  i386


FreeBSD 9.2-STABLE #57  r262545M/262552:902506: Thu Feb 27 06:26:32 PST 2014     root@g1-253.catwhisker.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/CANARY  amd64

FreeBSD 10.0-STABLE #49  r262544M/262552:1000702: Thu Feb 27 07:09:11 PST 2014     root@g1-253.catwhisker.org:/common/S3/obj/usr/src/sys/CANARY  amd64

FreeBSD 11.0-CURRENT #48  r262552M/262552:1100009: Thu Feb 27 09:09:26 PST 2014     root@g1-253.catwhisker.org:/common/S4/obj/usr/src/sys/CANARY  amd64



Each of the above is now set up with NEW_XORG and pkgng.

As far as I'm concerned, this PR may be closed as "fixed."

Peace,
david
-- 
David H. Wolfskill				david@catwhisker.org
Taliban: Evil cowards with guns afraid of truth from a 14-year old girl.
